ammo_clip_12gauge.name: 12 Gauge Shotgun Shells
ammo_clip_12gauge.description: Powerful shotgun shells for close combat

ammo_clip_762.name: 7.62mm Rifle Ammo
ammo_clip_762.description: High caliber rounds for assault rifles and sniper rifles

health_injector.name: Phoenix Injector
health_injector.description: Phoenix Auto-Injector. Restores 60HP and boosts speed for 8s. Highly addictive: each use permanently reduces max health.

stim_patch.name: Stim Patch
stim_patch.description: Standard military-grade medpatch. Restores 30HP. No side effects.

adrenaline_shot.name: Adrenaline Shot
adrenaline_shot.description: Combat stimulant. Greatly increases movement speed for 5s. No healing.

rad_suppressor.name: RAD Suppressor
rad_suppressor.description: Experimental Armengard compound. Neutralises Phoenix Injector addiction and restores lost max health.
